name: Overpass (OpenStreetMap)
description: Search places and points of interest on OpenStreetMap (restaurants, hotels, hiking huts, drinking water, EV charging, and 25+ more presets). Geocoding via Nominatim, POI search via Overpass API.

credentials_optional.label: Overpass API Endpoint
credentials_optional.hint: Override the default public endpoint. Use https://overpass.kumi.systems/api/interpreter as an alternative mirror if the public API is rate-limited. Default: https://overpass-api.de/api/interpreter

tools.name: geocode_place
tools.description: Convert a place name, address, or city into latitude/longitude coordinates (via Nominatim)

tools.name: find_nearby
tools.description: Find points of interest near a location by preset category (28 categories: food, accommodation, shopping, tourism, transport, outdoor/hiking, utilities)

tools.name: search_custom
tools.description: Run a custom Overpass QL query for advanced use cases (power users)

author: freddy-schuetz
